source: bench gain sweep on the REAL gearboxed motor (bench/sweep_gains.py)

faster_alternative.note: 6x faster settle with 0% overshoot; ranked lower ONLY because the noise-inflated oscillation metric penalized it. The heavier 150KV tolerates kp 60 without over-speed. Prefer for hip/knee if you want snappier tracking.

notes: REAL-MOTOR VERIFIED — load these (or the kp 60 faster_alternative). velocity_kp IS the firmware Kd; position_ki is the firmware Ki. The sim-optimized values (kp 51 / kd 6.0) were REJECTED: the smooth model over-rewards high damping the real motor doesn't want. kd 1.5 beat 3/4.5; ki 0 confirmed. Base per-motor-type gains from the free bench actuator; expect minor adjustment under real joint load.
